'''鈭歠-m-t-dh''' ('''kafamtedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chare|chare]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-m-t-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chare|chare]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-m-t-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kafamtedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifamtedhoko|thifamtedhoko]] || [[word:jifamtedhoko|jifamtedhoko]] || [[word:shifamtedhoko|shifamtedhoko]] || [[word:kifamtedhoko|kifamtedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofamtedhoko|thofamtedhoko]] || [[word:jofamtedhoko|jofamtedhoko]] || [[word:shofamtedhoko|shofamtedhoko]] || [[word:kofamtedhoko|kofamtedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙famtedhoko|th忙famtedhoko]] || [[word:j忙famtedhoko|j忙famtedhoko]] || [[word:sh忙famtedhoko|sh忙famtedhoko]] || [[word:k忙famtedhoko|k忙famtedhoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafamtedhoko|thafamtedhoko]] || [[word:jafamtedhoko|jafamtedhoko]] || [[word:shafamtedhoko|shafamtedhoko]] || [[word:kafamtedhoko|kafamtedhoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shafamtedhithi|shafamtedhithi]] || [[word:shafamtedhiji|shafamtedhiji]] || [[word:shafamtedhishi|shafamtedhishi]] || [[word:shafamtedhiki|shafamtedhiki]]
